---
title: "About"
---

I'm a Senior Data Scientist based in San Francisco with 10+ years of progressive experience spanning operations, analytics, and data science.

**Career path:** Started in operations at ZocDoc, transitioned into analytics at Square (now Block), and grew into a senior data science role at Atlassian over 6 years. Also taught data analytics at General Assembly.

**What I do:** Build targeting models, experimentation frameworks, and AI-powered tools that help teams make better decisions. At Atlassian, my work attributed $20M in bookings and $50M in pipeline to enterprise marketing programs.

**What sets me apart:** My path through operations and teaching means I communicate analysis in terms stakeholders actually act on. I also led AI adoption for a 30+ person data org — training, tooling, and hands-on enablement with LLMs, RAG, and agentic workflows.

**What I'm looking for:** Senior data science roles where I can combine analytical rigor with AI-augmented workflows, ideally at companies pushing the boundaries of how data teams work.

## Skills

**Languages:** Python (Pandas, NumPy, scikit-learn, PyTorch), SQL

**Platforms:** Snowflake, Databricks, Marketo, Salesforce, AWS, GCP, Airflow

**Methods:** Propensity Modeling, Segmentation & Targeting, Lift Analysis, A/B Testing, Experimentation Design

**AI/LLM:** LLMs, RAG, Prompt Engineering, Agentic Systems

**Visualization:** Tableau, Streamlit, Matplotlib

## Education

- **B.A. Psychology** — UC Santa Barbara
- **Post-Baccalaureate, Mathematics** — City University of New York
